author: lOrm
content:
## Current state (src/tui/components/, ~757 LOC)

**Plumbing landed in b9e13aa:**
- `components/mod.rs`: `Overlay` trait (`render(frame, area)` + `handle_key(key) -> OverlayAction`), `OverlayAction::{Consumed|Close|ResumeSession(String)}`, `centered_rect(percent_x, percent_y, area)` helper.
- `components/help.rs` (351 LOC): scrollable keyboard-shortcut overlay.
- `components/log_selector.rs` (303 LOC): JSONL session picker with date/preview.
- `tui/app.rs:420-423`: `enum ActiveOverlay { Help(HelpOverlay), LogSelector(LogSelector) }` â€” adding a variant requires the match arms at app.rs:911-912 (key dispatch) and app.rs:1780-1781 (render).
- `keybindings/resolver.rs:20`: `KeyAction::ModelPicker` already exists as a binding target but no overlay listens.

**Not landed:** ModelPicker, ModePicker, NotificationBar, AskUserQuestion dialog.

## Phase 2 spec â€” four components, each ~250 LOC

**1. ModelPicker â€” `components/model_picker.rs`**
```rust
pub struct ModelPicker {
    models: Vec<ModelEntry>,
    selected: usize,
    scroll_offset: usize,
}
pub struct ModelEntry {
    pub provider: String,        // "anthropic"
    pub model_id: String,         // "claude-sonnet-4-5"
    pub display_name: String,     // "Claude Sonnet 4.5"
    pub supports_thinking: bool,
    pub default_effort: EffortLevel,
}
impl ModelPicker {
    pub fn from_config(config: &AppConfig) -> Self;  // iterates config.providers
}
impl Overlay for ModelPicker { /* Up/Down nav, Enter â†’ returns OverlayAction::Selected(ModelEntry) */ }
```
Extend `OverlayAction` with `SelectModel(ModelEntry)`. App handles it by updating `App::model` + `App::provider` + the next outgoing request's endpoint headers. Open via `/model` (no args) â€” wire in `cli/commands/mod.rs` slash dispatch.

**2. ModePicker â€” `components/mode_picker.rs`** (mirror of ModelPicker)
```rust
pub struct ModePicker { modes: &'static [(Mode, &'static str)], selected: usize }
```
Modes are the existing `Mode::{Build|Plan|Extend|Refactor}` enum from `tui/app.rs`. `OverlayAction::SelectMode(Mode)`. Open via `/mode` (no args).

**3. NotificationBar â€” `components/notification_bar.rs`** (NOT an overlay)
Render directly in `tui/app.rs:1780`-adjacent code as a one-row strip at the bottom of `frame.size()`, ABOVE the input box, when `App::notifications.front().is_some()`.
```rust
pub struct Notification {
    pub text: String,
    pub kind: NotificationKind,   // RateLimit | ToolDenied | MemorySaved | Info
    pub created_at: Instant,
    pub ttl: Duration,            // default 3s
}
pub struct NotificationBar { queue: VecDeque<Notification> }
impl NotificationBar {
    pub fn push(&mut self, n: Notification);
    pub fn tick(&mut self);                    // drop expired
    pub fn current(&self) -> Option<&Notification>;
    pub fn render(&self, frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect);
}
```
Push sites: rate-limit response in `proxy.rs`, permission denial in `permission_mgr`, memory.rs `archival_insert`. Add `App::notifications: NotificationBar` field, call `notifications.tick()` in the main event loop before render.

**4. AskUserQuestion dialog â€” `components/ask_user_question.rs`**
Intercepts the existing `USER_QUESTION_MARKER` JSON payload (src/tools/mod.rs:113, src/tools/ask_user.rs:151). Current flow surfaces it as plain text â€” replace that with overlay open.
```rust
pub struct AskUserQuestionOverlay {
    questions: Vec<Question>,
    current_q_idx: usize,
    cursor: usize,
    selections: Vec<Vec<usize>>,  // per-question multi-select
}
pub struct Question {
    pub prompt: String,
    pub options: Vec<String>,
    pub multi_select: bool,
}
```
Detection point: `tools::execute_tool` returns a string whose first byte is `{` â€” parse with `serde_json::from_str::<UserQuestionPayload>`; if it matches, route the result to the App via a new channel `App::pending_question_tx` instead of streaming as a message. Overlay submits via `OverlayAction::AnswerQuestions(Vec<Vec<usize>>)`, App formats the response and feeds it back to the proxy as the tool result.

**File layout:**
- 4 new files under `src/tui/components/` (~250 LOC each)
- 4 new `ActiveOverlay` variants + their match arms (3 sites Ă— 4 = 12 lines)
- 4 new `OverlayAction` variants
- 2 slash-command dispatch entries (`/model`, `/mode`)
- 1 notification-bar render call

**Test scaffold** â€” per component:
- `<component>_navigates_with_arrow_keys`
- `<component>_returns_action_on_enter` / `<component>_closes_on_esc`
- For NotificationBar: `expired_notifications_dropped_on_tick`, `queue_caps_at_8`.

Each component is a self-contained PR. Closing the umbrella â€” Phase 2 can land them in any order.
